title: Locveil device descriptor (device-integration convention v1)
description: One per Locveil-built device. Declares the device's wire surface (MQTT controls, wb-mqtt-v1) and its canonical capability mapping. Owned by the device's repo; validated against this schema in that repo's CI; consumed as-is by the bridge.

convention.description: The device-integration convention version this descriptor conforms to.

descriptor_version.description: This descriptor's own revision; bump on any change.

profile.description: The wire profile the device speaks. ha-mqtt and device-hosted REST are reserved for later convention versions.

app.description: The per-device firmware app name, as reported in the meta/locveil stamp.

confirm_latency_ms.description: STATIC worst-case time from command publish to echo, in milliseconds. A promise, not a measurement channel.

capabilities.description: Canonical capability mapping. Capability ids, action names, and canonical value tokens must already exist in the bridge's pinned vocabulary — descriptors never invent canonical tokens.

notes.description: Free-form device truth worth surfacing to an integrator (firmware-internal interlocks, quirks).

labels.description: Localized strings: ru + en required, de optional.

type.description: WB control type. pushbutton = momentary (transient ack, not retained); the rest are stateful (retained value).

feedback.description: true when the device echoes state the bridge can gate on (stateful controls); false for fire-and-forget momentary surfaces.

reconcile.description: Whether the bridge's reconciler may drive this capability toward scenario targets.

state_field.description: The canonical state field this capability reads back, where stateful.

control.description: The MQTT control this canonical action writes (must name a key of controls).

payload.description: Static payload published to <control>/on; omitted for pushbuttons (the profile fires "1").

param_map.description: Canonical param name -> value placeholder mapping for parametric actions ({value} convention).

control.description: The MQTT control this field mirrors (must name a key of controls). Defaults to the field name.

values.description: Enum value table in the catalog's {wire, canonical, labels} triplet form.

arm_action.description: The arming action that must precede it (e.g. arm_record). The arm is consumed on use.

window_ms.description: How long an arm stays valid.
